description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black and dark olive color scheme. The upper receiver and handguard are encased in a segmented, metallic-looking shroud, likely for heat dissipation and protection. The stock is integrated into the rear of the weapon, forming a compact bullpup configuration, which positions the magazine and action behind the trigger for a shorter overall length. The grip is ergonomic, with a pronounced trigger guard and a solid, angular structure. The barrel is relatively short and appears to be standard, with no visible muzzle device attached. The overall build suggests a focus on maneuverability and durability, suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, bullpup-style rifle with a segmented metallic shroud and integrated stock, finished in black and dark olive. Its design emphasizes maneuverability and tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the segmented upper shroud and integrated bullpup stock.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the handguard and shroud.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of view 0, with clear visibility of the grip and stock integration.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the compactness of the bullpup design and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
